extension.summary: Genesis - Stream Movies and TV Shows with Debrid, Trakt, CocoScrapers, Gears
extension.description:
Genesis - Your ultimate streaming addon for Movies and TV Shows. Torrent and streaming scrapers with debrid support (Real-Debrid, Premiumize, AllDebrid, TorBox). External scraper support for CocoScrapers and Gears Scrapers modules. Full Trakt.tv integration. Fully compatible with Kodi 21 Omega and above (Python 3).
Features: - Built-in scrapers: Meteor, Streamthru, Torz, Webstreamr - Torrent scrapers: 1337x, YTS, EZTV, TorrentGalaxy, ThePirateBay - External scrapers: CocoScrapers, Gears Scrapers (install separately) - Debrid: Real-Debrid, Premiumize, AllDebrid, TorBox - Trakt.tv: Auth, watchlists, collections, progress, history - TMDB metadata, poster art, genre browsing - Multiple skins/themes via Genesis Themepak - Autoplay and resume playback
extension.disclaimer: The author does not host or distribute any of the content displayed by this addon. The author does not have any affiliation with the content provider.
extension.news:
v9.4.0 (2026) - FIXED: All movie/TV categories now load properly (migrated from broken IMDB scraping to Trakt API) - FIXED: Metadata enrichment migrated from dead OMDB to TMDB API (posters, cast, directors, plot) - FIXED: Genre browsing uses correct Trakt genre slugs (science-fiction, superhero, etc.) - FIXED: All Trakt API URLs updated to api.trakt.tv (HTTPS) - ADDED: TMDB poster/fanart/backdrop artwork for all movies and TV shows - ADDED: Full cast and director info from TMDB credits API - ADDED: Updated TV Networks list (Disney+, Apple TV+, Paramount+, Peacock, Hulu) - ADDED: TMDB-powered person search and popular actors browsing
v9.3.0 (2026) - FIXED: Python 3 / Kodi 21 compatibility across ALL files - FIXED: Trakt auth URL updated from api-v2launch.trakt.tv to api.trakt.tv (HTTPS) - FIXED: All debrid resolvers (RD, PM, AD, TorBox) Python 3 imports - ADDED: CocoScrapers and Gears Scrapers external provider support
v9.2.6 (2026) - User's fixed build for Kodi 21 - Meteor, Streamthru, Torz, Webstreamr scrapers
